name: Dinosaur Cousin Squad
short_description: A cozy lil' prehistoric platformer where you help five dinosaurs escape an apocalyptic disaster through five biomes.
detailed_description:
Five dinosaur cousins race against the clock to avoid a nuclear winter brought on by a huge asteroid!

That's kind of a downer sentence to run with, right? It's a cozy dinosaur platformer where you jump and stuff! Help Blaster, Lucky, Evie, Sweet Pea, and Silky (please ignore that they are all wildly different species) as they jump, bite, swim, laser breath, and double jump across an ever-changing landscape to get home in time for dinner! Or at least to avoid the apocalypse!

  • Family Friendly!: A platformer for all! Dinosaur fun for every age! Pun intended!

  • Five Dino Cousins!: Each of the five controllable dinos comes with their own special ability!

  • Five different enemy types!: Yes, five is a small number, but they all are dedicated to messing up your day!

  • 25 levels!: From ice worlds to lava-filled spooky worlds!
